From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>

Date: Tue, 05 Mar 2024 07:43:03 -0800
Subject: Trump seeks knockout as 'Super Tuesday' states choose nominees

Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

    <td class="OneColLarge">
        <table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0px 5px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);" width="600">
            <tr>

                    <a id="LrgCardImage1" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADY57ELMWGQC2VCS5PNWRZEARYW7PHJH3EPHTIOJWTBN2LGJPXLFPYLB2XRHSRIBV2MG5BSRE4PYYG5LCCSSZ3UF5T4GQ7RHUFV2QSZ4N6LNSSHHWZI3NGCDZXYO5G3NZJMOVLZBFOB25Q5HDKZTP2ODOJ64FJWAPS5NFIDCKLD4XHOU7WFGW&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">

            <tr>
                <td width="560" align="left" style="padding: 20px 20px 8px 20px; font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size:28px; line-height:1.2;color:#333333;font-weight:normal;text-decoration:none;">

                        Trump seeks knockout as 'Super Tuesday' states choose nominees

            <tr>
                <td align="left" style="padding: 0px 20px 11px 20px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 18px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.3;">
                    <a id="LrgCardSummary1" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADNCMB232B63KPAYFDPARZN625BDRQXYVBVA2EW4IVI72EDH6POEQ4GNTNH4KMI5TOCDF4RCAEF4R2HZAZKZLTDFKTIZTQQQX27TDL3IHZMXFHRGCLXE75CERBNKZD5OQKXDQOM6KUEEDG6RZ7O4NO7FTV3BTSBXXREWDD2M244CCHPPRAYJW&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">
                            By Joseph Ax and Gram Slattery FORT WORTH, Texas (Reuters) - Donald Trump will aim to deliver a knockout blow on "Super Tuesday"…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td height="25" align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 0px 20px 15px 37px;">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">

                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">

<td class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);">
                <td>

            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="SmlArticleTitle4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADACMQ7VG6BNBXKAXGGWOBDM5EY3ZRTA666S6DSUONEKQVEFIJFKGTAHLDIG4QVG6QZLZABPEYDN3UKTSSCBNQWWDR2RAJBDSDYBTO3E6RVEFRZVCP2SLGPCBOP2WSSB3VVMCE3MTC67WJXGPAXUTXZRPEBKS2ZYR6MCGYYTQB7LZGVG4ZFQW&" target="_blank">

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                    <td height="45" style="padding-right: 12px; padding-top: 5px">
                                        <a id="SmlArticlePubLogo4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADJ3S5M6DYSQNPKUE2EKNKPQLJ7BHK2Q25EEMPI4EEDETYDAINVXS5Y5ACIAJ3IOZKBAOZLE7W3GN4L2ZZWXECQKNQ6ESGDEPC7FNHNMJKBIWQTT7ESIMEWHU4AIPKRYCTH7KBPOTWRJXBVWGAHYWXUGVWMSYCOAIBUQTKS2K7GRSLNJSK45E&" target="_blank">

                                        </a>
                                    </td>
                                <td height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">
                                    <a id="SmlArticlePubName4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADWMVNJ3M367MG4BJNUXXAU64GYHGEKY2L2NGFNIZ4VFBQRAGWW3MILZOX6LWQUVGZHEW5ULWFI4ZKL4AYVTCOOVKPKBFR56TWZUWH64SCLPL7HO52ZINRGRYOWQGOIFNOAB67CERX2VUQUVEALMNFQNQYRXALMGVJQVWAEWJERI6GY7VD2HY&" target="_blank">

                                </td>
                            </tr>

        </tbody>
    </table>
</td>
                                    <td style="padding:4px;margin:0px;width:0px; background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;
                                    </td>
                                    
<td class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);">

    <td align="center">

        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">
